title: ruagea pilanthera
intro: Ruagea pilanthera, also known as 'Pilaneiro' or 'Kukoamine', is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Ruagea pilanthera lie in its ability to inhibit the production of an enzyme called 15-lipoxygenase, which plays a role in the development of various diseases. This plant is reported to possess health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially acting as an anticancer agent. In traditional medicine, Ruagea pilanthera is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, to leverage its medicinal properties for various health issues.
